nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 67, with temperatures rising to around 69 overnight. South wind 10 to 15 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 9am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 78. South wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms

Mostly cloudy, with a low around 65. South wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
